confidence.explanation: Confidence derived from 214 supporting evidences, 44 validated entities, and document completeness of 38%.

recommendations.recommendation_explanation: The document was classified under 'Agriculture' with confidence score 0.33. Based on this classification, related domains, tags and use cases have been recommended to enrich downstream intelligence processing.
recommendations.intelligence_summary: This document primarily belongs to the Agriculture domain. It is strongly associated with Smart Farming, AgriTech. The extracted intelligence can be used for classification, search, and knowledge management purposes. Additional recommendations have been generated to enrich future analysis.
